ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion */,
  "emotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the emotion (e.g., Anger, Sadness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emotion */,
  "intensity_scale" INTEGER /* Intensity scale of the emotion (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotion_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being classified */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emotion being classified */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the classification (0-100) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the classification was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the classification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_classifications_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_classifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external, public) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_data_points" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the relationship between the dataset and the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., Supervised Learning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model type */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (0-100) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_type_id") REFERENCES model_types ("model_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_training_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_classifications" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the relationship between the model and the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_datasets" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions the user has for the dataset (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., emotion recognition, sentiment analysis) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emotion being reported on */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the report (0-100) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the report details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "emotion_id")
)
